design_philosophy.core_loop: Select team, manage formations and player positioning, execute real-time matches with passing, shooting, and defensive mechanics
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Balancing offensive aggression with defensive stability; converting scoring opportunities while preventing opponent breakthroughs
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Manage and play as an international football team; compete in tournament or exhibition matches against national squads
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Early 90s arcade-style football simulation prioritizing accessibility and match-pace over deep tactical complexity; emphasizes action over management screens

difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: AI opponent difficulty likely adjustable via team selection; tournament progression structured by opponent strength

progression.unlock_mechanism: Tournament bracket advancement; unlocking matches against stronger national teams through victories
replayability_hooks: Multiple national teams with distinct rosters
International team variety providing different playstyles

environmental_storytelling: Stadium presentation implies international tournament setting
